content: Table-stakes platformer SFX: jump, land, pickup/coin, switch/lever, door, fanfare on level clear. Pitch/speed variation conveys weight and mood (playful boing vs heavy thud); Mario-style square-wave chirp is the archetype for jump. Sync SFX tightly to on-screen action to bridge input and visual motion. Sources: itch.io/OpenGameArt pack taxonomies, CapCut/UE marketplace SFX guides.
